title: Fields of a Django ModelForm should be defined explicitly
description: Avoid using Meta.fields_specified attribute in Django ModelForm as it can lead to unexpected behavior.
message: Avoid using Meta.fields_specified attribute in Django ModelForm
recommendation: Use fields directly instead of Meta.fields_specified

noncompliant.description: Using Meta.fields_specified attribute in a Django ModelForm

compliant.code:
from django import forms
class MyForm(forms.ModelForm):
    field1 = forms.CharField()
    field2 = forms.CharField()
compliant.description: Explicitly defining fields in a Django ModelForm

why_is_this_an_issue: Using Meta.fields_specified can lead to unexpected behavior, such as not including all necessary fields or allowing unexpected ones.
how_to_fix: Explicitly define each field in the ModelForm.
